name: Solarius Capital Acquisition Corp.
business: Solarius Capital Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any specific business combination target and has not engaged in any substantive discussions with any target. The company has no operating history and has generated no revenues.
